harnessProfile.description: Self-contained root instruction surface plus simple platform routers.
harnessProfile.name: minimal

limitations: Single tiny implementation repair task; not held out.
Profile roots are ignored scratch fixtures, not long-lived target repositories.
Codex JSONL did not emit the configured model name in this run.
Prompt/cache state from nearby runs may affect cached input buckets.
Raw JSONL contains local working-directory output and remains ignored under .harnessforge/.

mechanism.name: verification_feedback
mechanism.notes: Runner used scratch HOME and CODEX_HOME, ignore-user-config, ignore-rules, disabled hooks/plugins/memories/apps/multi_agent, and workspace-write sandboxing.
mechanism.risk: Minimal startup guidance may require more rediscovery before editing.

task.description: Fix the failing test in this tiny Python repo. Make the smallest code change, then run python3 -m unittest discover -s tests. Do not edit harness docs unless required for the fix. Final answer: one sentence with the changed file and verification result.
